---
title: "My EVAL 1"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: columns
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard) # always
```

<!-- links -->
```{r}
map1link = "https://github.com/Frazambito/EVAL_IND-1/raw/main/map1.rds"
map2link = "https://github.com/Frazambito/EVAL_IND-1/raw/main/map2.rds"
map3link = "https://github.com/Frazambito/EVAL_IND-1/raw/main/map3.rds"

viz1=url(map1link)

viz2=url(map2link)

viz3=url(map3link)
```

## Intro {.sidebar}

Evaluacion individual 1 - Generacion de mapas DDM, PSM Y CHOROPLETH MAP. 
20203341 - Franco Andre Zambrano Cotrina. 
2026-1. 


## Column {.tabset .tabset-fade}

### DDM

```{r}

readRDS(viz1)
```

### PSM

```{r}

readRDS(viz2)
```

### CLOROPLETH

```{r}

readRDS(viz3)
```

```
